caption: The video begins with a title screen for the "World Policy Conference," featuring a blue globe and world map backdrop, emphasizing a global theme. The text is prominently displayed in white, making it stand out against the dark background. As the scene transitions, the screen darkens significantly, almost to black, but the conference's logo remains faintly visible. Additional text appears, indicating that this is the 16th edition of the conference, focusing on "Global Governance." The event is scheduled for November 3-5, 2023, in Abu Dhabi. The overall tone suggests a formal and significant international gathering aimed at discussing global policy issues.
